appraisal_events.evidence: « C'est entendu, je réponds pour elle, j'en fais mon affaire. » — « Robert de Saint-Loup, comme je vous aime ! »
appraisal_events.explanation: After Robert readily commits to arrange access to the aunt's painting, the narrator bursts into explicit affection, signaling admiration and gratitude toward Robert.

status_effects.explanation: Robert's standing rises locally because the narrator openly admires and values him for his helpful promise.
